verbatim_snippet: Box was supposed to arrive Friday, didn't show until Tuesday. Third time in two months.
Just need to update my card on file.
New box design — got it crushed in half, two items broken inside.
Tracking said delivered but nothing at my door. Driver photo shows wrong building.
Password reset email never came. Tried 4 times.
Whoever changed the packaging — it's literally impossible to open without scissors and I cut myself.
One item past its best-by date, swap requested.
Order placed Sunday, promised Wed, now showing next Monday. Cancelling if it slips again.
Can't log in on the iOS app since the update. Web works fine.
The new boxes are smaller but everything inside shifts around and arrives banged up.
Late again. You used to be reliable.
Driver left it in the rain on my porch. Soaked through the new box, contents ruined.
Just want to say your billing team is amazing, fixed my issue in minutes.
App keeps logging me out every time I switch tabs in the browser.
Got an injury opening this new packaging. Will be sharing on social.
Two missed delivery windows this week alone. What is going on with your carrier?
Quality of the produce was great this week, just wanted to mention.
Two-factor code is going to my old number. No way to update it without calling in.
Late delivery. Again.
New box arrived already torn at the top. Whatever the old supplier was, bring them back.
How do I refer a friend, can't find the link in the app.
Carrier said attempted delivery but I was home all day with the door open. Pattern with your driver in my area.
Crushed box, two broken items. This is the fourth time since you switched packaging.
Item received was the wrong flavor, but tasted fine I guess.
